title: Why I let visitors play chess against my resume
summary: Portfolios list skills. Games prove thinking. Here is why my career is playable, and what recruiters do differently when they can capture a pawn.

title: Shipping with AI at each elbow: my Upsquare workflow
summary: Running 3-4 products at once is only possible because AI tools carry the syntax while I carry the system. My daily loop with Claude and Cursor-style workflows.
